sections.paragraph:
an unused root [not given in Thes. the derivative is there referred to יָצָא]. Syr. ܨܰܙܰܙ to stain, ܨܙܳܐܳ dirty, stained. But, however, these words appear to be secondary, and to have a signification derived from that of excrement (צֵאָה, צֹואָה), so that the primary root is יָצָא. Hence-

צוא

m., filthy, used of garments, Zec 3:3, Zec 3:4.
